nasb.text: He will deliver one who is not innocent, And he will be delivered through the cleanness of your hands.”

esv.text: He delivers even the one who is not innocent, who will be delivered through the cleanness of your hands.”

cnv.text: 並非無辜的人，　神尚且搭救他； 他要因你手中的潔淨得救拔。”

ccb.text: 祂甚至会解救有罪之人， 他们必因你的手清洁而获救。”
